description: Run a team showcase series: each person presents a short interest topic with slides to the team. Primary goals are connection and low-stakes public speaking practice for support staff who are strong on phone and weak in rooms.

examples.context: Leadership ran class-style talks. People presented interests. Some light, some life stories, some hobby depth.
examples.resolution: Team knew each other. Speaking reps landed. Ready for harder rooms later.

examples.context: Rep excellent on phone; in-person with sales was teeth-pulling.
examples.resolution: Safe first talk on a personal interest. Later transferred to customer explanation.

examples.context: Team feared it was a secret performance review.
examples.resolution: Charter said no grades. Focus stay on bond + skill. Participation held.
